title: Entity-density error path lacks retry backoff for persistent build failures
scopeProof: refreshIfStale is the only cache-rebuild site. The error path is the only code that sets lastBuildOk=false while updating lastBuiltAt.
recommendation: Either do NOT update lastBuiltAt in catch block, or introduce separate lastErrorAt timestamp with error-specific backoff.

title: routingReasons mislabels intent-triggered BM25 preservation as authority-artifact
scopeProof: The reason string appears only at query-router.ts:317. shouldPreserveBm25 has two return paths; only the artifact path justifies the label.
recommendation: Split reason into bm25-preserved-by-intent vs bm25-preserved-for-authority-artifact.

direction: race condition in entity-density cache rebuild
reason: Single-threaded Node.js — no interruption point between staleness check and cachedTerms assignment. refreshIfStale is fully synchronous.

direction: graph channel missing from complex-tier find_decision queries
reason: Complex tier already includes graph+degree by default. The override is a no-op (correctly skipped at query-router.ts:325). routingReasons intentionally absent since channels were not added by preservation.
while (recentDecisions.length > 200) shift() — keeps exactly 200. 201st entry triggers shift, leaving 200. Test 012-T3.1 with 5 decisions returns correct 0.4 rate.
